※ Please note that outer plastic wrap will be removed for this product.

※ This product is limited to 1 per person.

The Pokémon TCG: Mega Charizard X ex Ultra-Premium Collection includes:

- 1 foil promo card featuring Mega Charizard X ex

- 1 foil promo card featuring Oricorio ex

- 65 card sleeves featuring Mega Charizard X

- 1 playmat featuring Mega Charizard X

- 1 deck box featuring Mega Charizard X

- 1 metal coin featuring Mega Charizard X

- 6 damage-counter dice

- 18 Pokémon TCG booster packs

- A code card for Pokémon TCG Live

Product Information

- Material: Paper/metal/neoprene/acrylic/polypropylene, ,

- Weight: 1090g

- Product Size: 21.70 cm H x 37.10 cm W x 8.80 cm Dcm x cm x cm (H x W x D)

Terms and Conditions

※ All prices are inclusive of tax.

※ Pokémon Store Online Singapore reserves the right to amend/withdraw the redemption, terms & conditions without prior notice.

※ Photographs are for illustrative purposes only. The actual product may differ in color and design, depending on the colour reproduction on your computer or mobile device.

※ Quantity of products is available on a first-come-first-serve basis. In the event the item is out of stock, we apologise in advance for any inconvenience caused.

※ To ensure the availability of items for all customers, a quantity restriction may be imposed on each customer. Any orders exceeding the imposed quantity may be cancelled without notification.

※ Due to the nature of the product, return, exchange and/or cancellation requests will not be accepted.

※ Return/Exchange requests due to change of mind will be rejected.
